title: New Media & Society
body: New Media & Society is a peer-reviewed academic journal covering the fields of sociology, media, and communication. The journal's editor-in-chief is Steve Jones (University of Illinois at Chicago). It has been in publication since 1999 and is published by SAGE Publishing.
categories: Articles with outdated impact factors from 2022
